ddls:
CREATE TABLE "postal_codes" (
  "old_index" INTEGER /* Unique identifier based on the old index system */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Postal code for the locale */,
  "locale" TEXT /* Locale description */,
  "city" TEXT /* City name */,
  "city_code" TEXT /* City code */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the locale */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the locale */,
  "dist_to_centre" REAL /* Distance from the central hub */,
  "boundary_coordinates" TEXT /* Boundary coordinates of the locale */,
  "population_density" REAL /* Population density of the locale */,
  "avg_elevation" REAL /* Average elevation of the locale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("old_index"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_postal_codes_city_code FOREIGN KEY ("city_code") REFERENCES cities ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "cities" (
  "city_code" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each city */,
  "city_name" TEXT /* Name of the city */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the city is located */,
  "mayor" TEXT /* Name of the current mayor */,
  "city_population" INTEGER /* Population of the city */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("city_code")
)

CREATE TABLE "fleet_management" (
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each vehicle */,
  "vehicle_type" TEXT /* Type of vehicle (e.g., van, truck) */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the vehicle (e.g., in transit, idle) */,
  "current_zip" TEXT /* Current postal code where the vehicle is located */,
  "route_id" INTEGER /* ID of the route the vehicle is assigned to */,
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* ID of the driver assigned to the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_make" TEXT /* Make of the vehicle */,
  "vehicle_model" TEXT /* Model of the vehicle */,
  "max_capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum capacity of the vehicle */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("vehicle_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_management_driver_id FOREIGN KEY ("driver_id") REFERENCES drivers ("driver_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_management_current_zip FOREIGN KEY ("current_zip") REFERENCES postal_codes ("zip"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_fleet_management_route_id FOREIGN KEY ("route_id") REFERENCES routes ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "routes" (
  "route_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each route */,
  "start_zip" TEXT /* Starting postal code for the route */,
  "end_zip" TEXT /* Ending postal code for the route */,
  "estimated_time" TEXT /* Estimated time to complete the route */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance of the route */,
  "route_type" TEXT /* Type of route (e.g., standard, priority) */,
  "priority" TEXT /* Priority of the route (e.g., high, low) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("route_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_status" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each package */,
  "current_status" TEXT /* Current status of the package (e.g., dispatched, in transit, delivered) */,
  "estimated_delivery_time" TEXT /* Estimated time of delivery */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Current postal code where the package is located */,
  "package_type" TEXT /* Type of package (e.g., regular, express) */,
  "package_weight" REAL /* Weight of the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_status_zip FOREIGN KEY ("zip") REFERENCES postal_codes ("zip")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_tracking" (
  "tracking_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each tracking event */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package being tracked */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the tracking event */,
  "event_description" TEXT /* Description of the event */,
  "zip" TEXT /* Postal code where the event occurred */,
  "event_type" TEXT /* Type of event (e.g., pickup, delivery) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("tracking_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_tracking_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES package_status ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_package_tracking_zip FOREIGN KEY ("zip") REFERENCES postal_codes ("zip")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Delivery address of the customer */,
  "company_name" TEXT /* Name of the company (if applicable) */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Job title of the customer (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "package_customer" (
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who owns the package */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("package_id", "customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "notifications" (
  "notification_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each notification */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer receiving the notification */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package related to the notification */,
  "notification_time" TEXT /* Time when the notification was sent */,
  "message" TEXT /* Content of the notification message */,
  "notification_type" TEXT /* Type of notification (e.g., email, SMS) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("notification_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_notifications_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES package_status ("package_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_feedback" (
  "feedback_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each feedback entry */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer providing feedback */,
  "package_id" INTEGER /* ID of the package related to the feedback */,
  "rating" INTEGER /* Rating given by the customer (1-5) */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Comments provided by the customer */,
  "feedback_type" TEXT /* Type of feedback (e.g., delivery, customer_service) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("feedback_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_package_id FOREIGN KEY ("package_id") REFERENCES package_status ("package_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_feedback_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "vehicle_maintenance" (
  "maintenance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle receiving maintenance */,
  "service_date" TEXT /* Date when the service occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance performed */,
  "next_service_date" TEXT /* Date for the next scheduled service */,
  "service_type" TEXT /* Type of service (e.g., routine, repair) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_vehicle_maintenance_vehicle_id FOREIGN KEY ("vehicle_id") REFERENCES fleet_management ("vehicle_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "drivers" (
  "driver_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each driver */,
  "driver_name" TEXT /* Name of the driver */,
  "license_number" TEXT /* License number of the driver */,
  "vehicle_id" INTEGER /* ID of the vehicle assigned to the driver */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("driver_id")
)
